parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, tavern_stage: { id: 'product', label: '商品', agent: 'Product Agent', artifact: 'product_profile', description: '沉淀 SKU、价格、卖点、FAQ 与合规边界', reusable: true }, tavern_stage_history: [...(item.tavern_stage_history || []), '商品'] } }];

const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, tavern_stage: { id: 'brand', label: '品牌', agent: 'Brand Agent', artifact: 'brand_brief', description: '生成品牌背书、调性、信任证明与人群定位', reusable: true }, tavern_stage_history: [...(item.tavern_stage_history || []), '品牌'] } }];

const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, tavern_stage: { id: 'story', label: '故事', agent: 'Story Agent', artifact: 'brand_story', description: '把品牌与商品转成直播间可讲述的故事线', reusable: true }, tavern_stage_history: [...(item.tavern_stage_history || []), '故事'] } }];

const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, tavern_stage: { id: 'script', label: '剧本', agent: 'Script Agent', artifact: 'live_script', description: '输出开场、讲品、促单、互动和收口口播', reusable: true }, tavern_stage_history: [...(item.tavern_stage_history || []), '剧本'] } }];

const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, tavern_stage: { id: 'storyboard', label: '分镜', agent: 'Storyboard Agent', artifact: 'shot_plan', description: '拆解镜头、字幕、视觉层和转场节奏', reusable: true }, tavern_stage_history: [...(item.tavern_stage_history || []), '分镜'] } }];

const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, tavern_stage: { id: 'director', label: '导演', agent: 'Director Agent', artifact: 'director_script', description: '协调镜头、节奏、表演与生产顺序', reusable: true }, tavern_stage_history: [...(item.tavern_stage_history || []), '导演'] } }];

const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, tavern_stage: { id: 'visual_director', label: '视觉导演', agent: 'Visual Director Agent', artifact: 'visual_blueprint', description: '生成品牌统一的 Visual Blueprint、Prompt、Asset Mapping 与 OBS 图层', reusable: true }, tavern_stage_history: [...(item.tavern_stage_history || []), '视觉导演'] } }];

const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, tavern_stage: { id: 'voice', label: '语音', agent: 'Voice Agent', artifact: 'speech_audio', description: '将口播剧本交给 TTS provider 生成语音素材', reusable: false }, tavern_stage_history: [...(item.tavern_stage_history || []), '语音'] } }];

const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, tavern_stage: { id: 'avatar', label: '数字人', agent: 'Avatar Agent', artifact: 'avatar_clip', description: '驱动数字人主播生成口播片段', reusable: false }, tavern_stage_history: [...(item.tavern_stage_history || []), '数字人'] } }];

const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, tavern_stage: { id: 'live_room', label: '直播间', agent: 'Scene Agent', artifact: 'live_room_composition', description: '组合背景、商品卡、权益 POP 与数字人图层', reusable: true }, tavern_stage_history: [...(item.tavern_stage_history || []), '直播间'] } }];

const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, tavern_stage: { id: 'video', label: '视频', agent: 'Composer Agent', artifact: 'composed_video', description: '用视频 provider/FFmpeg wrapper 合成完整直播视频', reusable: false }, tavern_stage_history: [...(item.tavern_stage_history || []), '视频'] } }];

const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, tavern_stage: { id: 'streaming', label: '推流', agent: 'Streaming Agent', artifact: 'stream_publish_plan', description: '生成 OBS/RTMP/平台开播检查与推流方案', reusable: false }, tavern_stage_history: [...(item.tavern_stage_history || []), '推流'] } }];
